Package
Description
com.aptcoursework.dao
Data Access Object (DAO) layer package for the APT Coursework application.

    Description

    OrdersDao.fetchOrderById(int orderId, int userId)

    Description

    OrdersDao.fetchOrdersByUser(int userId)
     
    ArrayList<Orders>
    OrdersDaoImpl.fetchOrdersByUser(int userId)
    Retrieves all orders for a specific user, ordered by creation date (newest first).
